text:
is a single by Megumi Hayashibara. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICM-2147, it was released on 06 December 2023. https://vgmdb.net/album/132899 It contains the two new theme song of the Pachinko Shin Evangelion http://king-cr.jp/artist/hayashi/news/ pachinko machine. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gB4005901/

Trivia

The location in the cover was in the Ube Shinkawa Station in Yamaguchi Prefecture.
Megumi claims that each part of "Shuketsu no Yari", is about a various characters of the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
According to her, the one using black in the cover is Rei Ayanami (tentative name). In the film, Rei Ayanami (tentative name) was absent. Megumi thinks this is her selfish desire to Rei Ayanami (tentative name) to be there too. She did this by using that specific dark outfit.
Her other clothes mirrors the same color and types used by the grown up Rei in the last scene of Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time.
The dark dress was designed by Megumi herself and made by a stylist she knew.
